steps.title: Use the reproduced clue
steps.content: The passage says elements of Spanish mission architecture have been "reproduced" throughout California. Santa Clara University is given as an example, so the blank needs a word meaning copied or modeled after.

steps.title: Eliminate mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice A means restore or modernize. Choice C means ignore or fail to care for. Choice D means refuse or turn away from. The needed word means copy or model after. The answer is B.
